ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Mario Torrigino to appear on May 14, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
